items.title: Verify from a clean kernel
items.example: Add it to your habit: every time you're 'done', Kernel → Restart & Run All → if it passes, save; if it doesn't, fix.

items.title: Extract stable logic
items.avoid: Keeping reusable code in cells forever.
items.prefer: Move it to importable, tested modules.
items.why: Reuse, testability and clean version control.
items.example: When you copy a function into a third notebook, that's the signal: promote it to `ragapp/<area>.py`, write a test, and have all three notebooks `import` from there.

items.title: VC hygiene
items.example:
```bash
pip install nbstripout && nbstripout --install
# now `git diff notebook.ipynb` shows only cell changes — no output noise
```

items.title: Secrets and data
items.avoid: Hard-coding keys or pasting large data.
items.prefer: Env/Secrets for keys; external storage for data.
items.example: Keys from `os.environ` (`.env` + `python-dotenv` locally, secrets manager in prod). Large datasets stay in S3 / GCS / Drive; the notebook holds the URL or path, not the bytes.
